raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need to output a bash command that lists names of bind functions containing "p". Likely using bind -p to list key bindings, then grep for 'p'. So: bind -p | grep -oP '\w+?='? Actually bind -p outputs like: "keyseq: function-name". We want function names containing p. So: bind -p | grep -oP '(?<=: )\w+' | grep p. Combine: bind -p | grep -oP '(?<=: )\w+' | grep p. Output one line.
